TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == KolinlanÊÝºÈôµËò≠ == Kolinlan o sakakay a kanatal itini i hekal, o kakahad i, ira2,166,086 km¬≤, mahaop a matahepo no so'eda ko 80% a sera. O sowal no Tanmay to "Kolinlan" hananay i, o "kandaway pala" anoca o "langsaway sera" , o ilaloma'ay no Tanmay Hontian-Kitakit a Niyah-pikowan a Etal. nikawrira, i 2008 mihecaan a Kapolongan-Pitopa malaheci i 2009 mihecaan a mafalic ko faco no kitakit malamisiieday to niyah-pikowan i lalomaan a demak, o kacacefelisan-demak ato roma a kitakti, o sofitay ato paysoan a demak o Tanmay sifo ko citodongay. O tatapangan a kitakit no Kolinla o Tanmay i 1973 miheca mikapot to kasasiromaroma a saopo no Yoropa, nikawrira, i 1982 mihecan a Kapolongan-Pitopa mihayi ko 'alomanay i 1985 miheca a "Kakaketon no Kolinlan" to piliyas to Yoropa-Lekatep,orasaka tahanini cowa ko cefang no Yoropa-Lekatep, nikawrira, o siikeda sanay a kapot no Yoropa-Patekoan Lekatep. O tamdaw no Kolinlan o tamdaw no Tanmay hananay ko pisa'osi, patokeled sa ira ko solongoc no Tamdaw no Yoropa-Lekatep. O Kolinlan matiya o Falo-kanatanatal, manga'ay a miocor to tosa a tamdaw mikapot to Kalomaocan no Tanmay kitakit. O sera no kolinlan sahetoay itiraay i Saka'amisay-Poco' no cikiw, ikakaay ko kasi'enaw. Malalaeday to riyar makakecor ato So'eda-Kanatal kitakit ato Kanata. Kolinlan-Kanatal(Kalaallit NunaatÔºõGr√∏nland) ira2,166,086 km¬≤, mahaop a matahepo no so'eda ko 80% a sera, itiraay i saka'amisan no sakawali no Ka'amisay-Amirika, ila'eday no Ka'amisay So'edaan-Riyar ato Tasiyang. O sa'osi i 2019 mihecaan ira ko 55,992 ko tamdaw, o kaditek no tamdaw 0.028 km¬≤.Mapangangan to Sakatosa-Karopaw ko Kolinlan, sakakaay ko kakahad no So'edaan-'Alo a karopaw,dengan i ka'amisay ato kawali ato ka'etipay-poco' ko cowa ka tahepo no so'eda, nawhani, fa'edetay ko romi'ad itini, orasaka, ira a masadak ko sera a manengneng. Ano waniken no mitahepoay a so'eda i sasifo'an wa ila'eno to ko sera. I sakawaliwalian no sasifo'an ko takaraway nani tongroh no riyar ira ko 3300 laya', i salawacan nani tongroh no riyar ira ko 1000~2000 laya'. Ano ha'eminen a mikarkar ko so'eda no Kolinlan, masakanatanatal ko namangicngicay no So'eda-'Alo,macakar to tongroh no riya to 7 laya'.
S.PHON: == ko~u…æin…æan*** == ko~u…æin…æan o~u sakakaj a kanata…æ itini i ƒß…ôka…æ, o~u kakaƒßa…¨~…Æ i, ira*,***,*** km*, maƒßao~up a mataƒß…ôpo~u no~u so~u °…ô…¨~…Æa ko~u **% a s…ôra. o~u so~uwa…æ no~u tanmaj to~u "ko~u…æin…æan" ƒßananaj i, o~u "kan…¨~…Æawaj pa…æa" ano~u ¶a o~u "…æa≈ãsawaj s…ôra" , o~u i…æa…æo~uma °aj no~u tanmaj ƒßo~untian-kitakit a nijaƒß-piko~uwan a …ôta…æ. nikawrira, i **** miƒß…ô ¶aan a kapo~u…æo~u≈ãan-pito~upa ma…æaƒß…ô ¶i i **** miƒß…ô ¶aan a mafa…æi ¶ ko~u fa ¶o~u no~u kitakit ma…æamisii…ô…¨~…Æaj to~u nijaƒß-piko~uwan i …æa…æo~umaan a …¨~…Æ…ômak, o~u ka ¶a ¶…ôf…ô…æisan-…¨~…Æ…ômak ato~u ro~uma a kitakti, o~u so~ufitaj ato~u pajso~uan a …¨~…Æ…ômak o~u tanmaj sifo~u ko~u ¶ito~u…¨~…Æo~u≈ãaj. o~u tatapa≈ãan a kitakit no~u ko~u…æin…æa o~u tanmaj i **** miƒß…ô ¶a mikapo~ut to~u kasasiro~umaro~uma a sao~upo~u no~u jo~uro~upa, nikawrira, i **** miƒß…ô ¶an a kapo~u…æo~u≈ãan-pito~upa miƒßaji ko~u °a…æo~umanaj i **** miƒß…ô ¶a a "kakak…ôto~un no~u ko~u…æin…æan" to~u pi…æijas to~u jo~uro~upa-…æ…ôkat…ôp,o~urasaka taƒßanini ¶o~uwa ko~u ¶…ôfa≈ã no~u jo~uro~upa-…æ…ôkat…ôp, nikawrira, o~u siik…ô…¨~…Æa sanaj a kapo~ut no~u jo~uro~upa-pat…ôko~uan …æ…ôkat…ôp. o~u tam…¨~…Æaw no~u ko~u…æin…æan o~u tam…¨~…Æaw no~u tanmaj ƒßananaj ko~u pisa °o~usi, pato~uk…ô…æ…ô…¨~…Æ sa ira ko~u so~u…æo~u≈ão~u ¶ no~u tam…¨~…Æaw no~u jo~uro~upa-…æ…ôkat…ôp. o~u ko~u…æin…æan matija o~u fa…æo~u-kanatanata…æ, ma≈ãa °aj a mio~u ¶o~ur to~u to~usa a tam…¨~…Æaw mikapo~ut to~u ka…æo~umao~u ¶an no~u tanmaj kitakit. o~u s…ôra no~u ko~u…æin…æan saƒß…ôto~uaj itiraaj i saka °amisaj-po~u ¶o~u ° no~u ¶ikiw, ikakaaj ko~u kasi °…ônaw. ma…æa…æa…ô…¨~…Æaj to~u rijar makak…ô ¶o~ur ato~u so~u °…ô…¨~…Æa-kanata…æ kitakit ato~u kanata. ko~u…æin…æan-kanata…æ(ka…æaa…æ…æit no~u~unaat**r*n…æan…¨~…Æ) ira*,***,*** km*, maƒßao~up a mataƒß…ôpo~u no~u so~u °…ô…¨~…Æa ko~u **% a s…ôra, itiraaj i saka °amisan no~u sakawa…æi no~u ka °amisaj-amirika, i…æa °…ô…¨~…Æaj no~u ka °amisaj so~u °…ô…¨~…Æaan-rijar ato~u tasija≈ã. o~u sa °o~usi i **** miƒß…ô ¶aan ira ko~u **,*** ko~u tam…¨~…Æaw, o~u ka…¨~…Æit…ôk no~u tam…¨~…Æaw *.*** km*.mapa≈ãa≈ãan to~u sakato~usa-karo~upaw ko~u ko~u…æin…æan, sakakaaj ko~u kakaƒßa…¨~…Æ no~u so~u °…ô…¨~…Æaan- °a…æo~u a karo~upaw,…¨~…Æ…ô≈ãan i ka °amisaj ato~u kawa…æi ato~u ka °…ôtipaj-po~u ¶o~u ° ko~u ¶o~uwa ka taƒß…ôpo~u no~u so~u °…ô…¨~…Æa, nawƒßani, fa °…ô…¨~…Æ…ôtaj ko~u ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ itini, o~urasaka, ira a masa…¨~…Æak ko~u s…ôra a man…ô≈ãn…ô≈ã. ano~u wanik…ôn no~u mitaƒß…ôpo~uaj a so~u °…ô…¨~…Æa i sasifo~u °an wa i…æa °…ôno~u to~u ko~u s…ôra. i sakawa…æiwa…æian no~u sasifo~u °an ko~u takarawaj nani to~u≈ãro~uƒß no~u rijar ira ko~u **** …æaja °, i sa…æawa ¶an nani to~u≈ãro~uƒß no~u rijar ira ko~u ****~**** …æaja °. ano~u ƒßa °…ômin…ôn a mikarkar ko~u so~u °…ô…¨~…Æa no~u ko~u…æin…æan, masakanatanata…æ ko~u nama≈ãi ¶≈ãi ¶aj no~u so~u °…ô…¨~…Æa- °a…æo~u,ma ¶akar to~u to~u≈ãro~uƒß no~u rija to~u * …æaja °.
S.FORM: == KolinlanÊÝºÈôµËò≠ == Kolinlan o sakakay a kanatal itini i hekal, o kakahad i, ira2,166,086 km¬≤, mahaop a matahepo no so'eda ko 80% a sera. O sowal no Tanmay to "Kolinlan" hananay i, o "kandaway pala" anoca o "langsaway sera" , o ilaloma'ay no Tanmay Hontian-Kitakit a Niyah-pikowan a Etal. nikawrira, i 2008 mihecaan a Kapolongan-Pitopa malaheci i 2009 mihecaan a mafalic ko faco no kitakit malamisiieday to niyah-pikowan i lalomaan a demak, o kacacefelisan-demak ato roma a kitakti, o sofitay ato paysoan a demak o Tanmay sifo ko citodongay. O tatapangan a kitakit no Kolinla o Tanmay i 1973 miheca mikapot to kasasiromaroma a saopo no Yoropa, nikawrira, i 1982 mihecan a Kapolongan-Pitopa mihayi ko 'alomanay i 1985 miheca a "Kakaketon no Kolinlan" to piliyas to Yoropa-Lekatep,orasaka tahanini cowa ko cefang no Yoropa-Lekatep, nikawrira, o siikeda sanay a kapot no Yoropa-Patekoan Lekatep. O tamdaw no Kolinlan o tamdaw no Tanmay hananay ko pisa'osi, patokeled sa ira ko solongoc no Tamdaw no Yoropa-Lekatep. O Kolinlan matiya o Falo-kanatanatal, manga'ay a miocor to tosa a tamdaw mikapot to Kalomaocan no Tanmay kitakit. O sera no kolinlan sahetoay itiraay i Saka'amisay-Poco' no cikiw, ikakaay ko kasi'enaw. Malalaeday to riyar makakecor ato So'eda-Kanatal kitakit ato Kanata. Kolinlan-Kanatal(Kalaallit NunaatÔºõGr√∏nland) ira2,166,086 km¬≤, mahaop a matahepo no so'eda ko 80% a sera, itiraay i saka'amisan no sakawali no Ka'amisay-Amirika, ila'eday no Ka'amisay So'edaan-Riyar ato Tasiyang. O sa'osi i 2019 mihecaan ira ko 55,992 ko tamdaw, o kaditek no tamdaw 0.028 km¬≤.Mapangangan to Sakatosa-Karopaw ko Kolinlan, sakakaay ko kakahad no So'edaan-'Alo a karopaw,dengan i ka'amisay ato kawali ato ka'etipay-poco' ko cowa ka tahepo no so'eda, nawhani, fa'edetay ko romi'ad itini, orasaka, ira a masadak ko sera a manengneng. Ano waniken no mitahepoay a so'eda i sasifo'an wa ila'eno to ko sera. I sakawaliwalian no sasifo'an ko takaraway nani tongroh no riyar ira ko 3300 laya', i salawacan nani tongroh no riyar ira ko 1000~2000 laya'. Ano ha'eminen a mikarkar ko so'eda no Kolinlan, masakanatanatal ko namangicngicay no So'eda-'Alo,macakar to tongroh no riya to 7 laya'.

ko~u ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ itini, o~urasaka, ira a masa…¨~…Æak ko~u s…ôra a man…ô≈ãn…ô≈ã. ano~u wanik…ôn no~u mitaƒß…ôpo~uaj a so~u °…ô…¨~…Æa i sasifo~u °an wa i…æa °…ôno~u to~u ko~u s…ôra. i sakawa…æiwa…æian no~u sasifo~u °an ko~u takarawaj nani to~u≈ãro~uƒß no~u rijar ira ko~u **** …æaja °, i sa…æawa ¶an nani to~u≈ãro~uƒß no~u rijar ira ko~u ****~**** …æaja °. ano~u ƒßa °…ômin…ôn a mikarkar ko~u so~u °…ô…¨~…Æa no~u ko~u…æin…æan, masakanatanata…æ ko~u nama≈ãi ¶≈ãi ¶aj no~u so~u °…ô…¨~…Æa- °a…æo~u,ma ¶akar to~u to~u≈ãro~uƒß no~u rija to~u * …æaja °.
